Variables.Name: SkeletalMesh
Variables.Description: The skeletal mesh used by this component.

Variables.Name: MasterPoseComponent
Variables.Description:
If set, this SkeletalMeshComponent will not use its SpaceBase for bone transform, but will
	 	use the component space transforms from the MasterPoseComponent. This is used when constructing a character using multiple skeletal meshes sharing the same
	 	skeleton within the same Actor.

Variables.Name: bUseBoundsFromMasterPoseComponent
Variables.Description:
When true, we will just using the bounds from our MasterPoseComponent.  This is useful for when we have a Mesh Parented
	  to the main SkelMesh (e.g. outline mesh or a full body overdraw effect that is toggled) that is always going to be the same
	  bounds as parent.  We want to do no calculations in that case.

Variables.Name: PhysicsAssetOverride
Variables.Description: PhysicsAsset is set in SkeletalMesh by default, but you can override with this value

Variables.Name: bOverrideMinLod
Variables.Description: Whether we should use the min lod specified in MinLodModel for this component instead of the min lod in the mesh

Variables.Name: ForcedLodModel
Variables.Description: If 0, auto-select LOD level. if >0, force to (ForcedLodModel-1).

Variables.Name: MinLodModel
Variables.Description:
This is the min LOD that this component will use.  (e.g. if set to 2 then only 2+ LOD Models will be used.) This is useful to set on
	  meshes which are known to be a certain distance away and still want to have better LODs when zoomed in on them.

Variables.Name: LODInfo
Variables.Description: LOD array info. Each index will correspond to the LOD index

Variables.Name: StreamingDistanceMultiplier
Variables.Description:
Allows adjusting the desired streaming distance of streaming textures that uses UV 0.
	  1.0 is the default, whereas a higher value makes the textures stream in sooner from far away.
	  A lower value (0.0-1.0) makes the textures stream in later (you have to be closer).
	  Value can be < 0 (from legcay content, or code changes)

Variables.Name: WireframeColor
Variables.Description: Wireframe color

Variables.Name: bForceWireframe
Variables.Description: Forces the mesh to draw in wireframe mode.

Variables.Name: bDisplayBones_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Draw the skeleton hierarchy for this skel mesh.

Variables.Name: bDisableMorphTarget
Variables.Description: Disable Morphtarget for this component.

Variables.Name: bHideSkin
Variables.Description: Don't bother rendering the skin.

Variables.Name: bPerBoneMotionBlur
Variables.Description: If true, use per-bone motion blur on this skeletal mesh (requires additional rendering, can be disabled to save performance).

Variables.Name: bComponentUseFixedSkelBounds
Variables.Description: When true, skip using the physics asset etc. and always use the fixed bounds defined in the SkeletalMesh.

Variables.Name: bConsiderAllBodiesForBounds
Variables.Description: If true, when updating bounds from a PhysicsAsset, consider _all_ BodySetups, not just those flagged with bConsiderForBounds.

Variables.Name: bFixCachedLocalBoundsIssue
Variables.Description: If true, cache correct local bounds. Otherwise cache a bounds transformed twice. See USkeletalMeshComponent::CalcBounds() --lyonarzhang

Variables.Name: MeshComponentUpdateFlag
Variables.Description: This is update frequency flag even when our Owner has not been rendered recently

Variables.Name: bIndirectLightingCachePositionUsingActorPosition
Variables.Description: If true, IndirectLightingCache will use actor postion to sample

Variables.Name: bForceMeshObjectUpdate
Variables.Description: If true, UpdateTransform will always result in a call to MeshObject->Update.

Variables.Name: bCanHighlightSelectedSections
Variables.Description: Whether or not we can highlight selected sections - this should really only be done in the editor

Variables.Name: bRecentlyRendered
Variables.Description: true if mesh has been recently rendered, false otherwise

Variables.Name: CustomSortAlternateIndexMode
Variables.Description:
Editor only. Used for manually selecting the alternate indices for
	   TRISORT_CustomLeftRight sections.

Variables.Name: bCastCapsuleDirectShadow
Variables.Description:
Whether to use the capsule representation (when present) from a skeletal mesh's ShadowPhysicsAsset for direct shadowing from lights.
	  This type of shadowing is approximate but handles extremely wide area shadowing well.  The softness of the shadow depends on the light's LightSourceAngle  SourceRadius.
	  This flag will force bCastInsetShadow to be enabled.

Variables.Name: bCastCapsuleIndirectShadow
Variables.Description: Whether to use the capsule representation (when present) from a skeletal mesh's ShadowPhysicsAsset for shadowing indirect lighting (from lightmaps or skylight).

Variables.Name: CapsuleIndirectShadowMinVisibility
Variables.Description: Controls how dark the capsule indirect shadow can be.

Variables.Name: bCPUSkinning
Variables.Description: Whether or not to CPU skin this component, requires render data refresh after changing

Variables.Name: CachedLocalBounds
Variables.Description: LocalBounds cached, so they're computed just once.

Variables.Name: bCachedLocalBoundsUpToDate
Variables.Description: true when CachedLocalBounds is up to date.

Variables.Name: bEnableUpdateRateOptimizations
Variables.Description:
if TRUE, Owner will determine how often animation will be updated and evaluated. See AnimUpdateRateTick()
	  This allows to skip frames for performance. (For example based on visibility and size on screen).

Variables.Name: bDisplayDebugUpdateRateOptimizations
bRenderStatic
Variables.Description: If true, render as static in reference pose.

Variables.Name: bUseBoneVisibilityPropagateFeature
Variables.Description: Engine modify Start +++++++++

Functions.Name: SetPhysicsAsset
Functions.Description: Override the Physics Asset of the mesh. It uses SkeletalMesh.PhysicsAsset, but if you'd like to override use this function

Functions.Name: GetNumLODs
Functions.Description: Get the number of LODs on this component

Functions.Name: SetMinLOD
Functions.Description: Set MinLodModel of the mesh component

Params.Name: InNewMinLOD
Params.Description: Set new MinLodModel that make sure the LOD does not go below of this value. Range from [0, Max Number of LOD - 1]. This will affect in the next tick update.

Functions.Name: SetForcedLOD
Functions.Description: Set MinLodModel of the mesh component

Params.Name: InNewForcedLOD
Params.Description: Set new ForcedLODModel that forces to set the incoming LOD. Range from [1, Max Number of LOD]. This will affect in the next tick update.

Functions.Name: GetNumBones
Functions.Description: Returns the number of bones in the skeleton.

Functions.Name: GetBoneIndex
Functions.Description: Find the index of bone by name. Looks in the current SkeletalMesh being used by this SkeletalMeshComponent.

Params.Name: BoneName
Params.Description: Name of bone to look up

Return.Description: Index of the named bone in the current SkeletalMesh. Will return INDEX_NONE if bone not found.

Functions.Name: GetBoneName
Functions.Description: Get Bone Name from index

Return.Description: the name of the bone at the specified index

Functions.Name: GetSocketBoneName
Functions.Description:
Returns bone name linked to a given named socket on the skeletal mesh component.
	  If you're unsure to deal with sockets or bones names, you can use this function to filter through, and always return the bone name.

Functions.Name: SetSkeletalMesh
Functions.Description: Change the SkeletalMesh that is rendered for this Component. Will re-initialize the animation tree etc.

Params.Name: NewMesh
Params.Description: New mesh to set for this component

Params.Name: bReinitPose
Params.Description: Whether we should keep current pose or reinitialize.

Functions.Name: GetSkeletalMesh
Functions.Description: Return SkeletalMesh.

Functions.Name: GetParentBone
Functions.Description: Get Parent Bone of the input bone

Return.Description: the name of the parent bone for the specified bone. Returns 'None' if the bone does not exist or it is the root bone

Functions.Name: SetVertexColorOverride_LinearColor
Functions.Description: Allow override of vertex colors on a per-component basis, taking array of Blueprint-friendly LinearColors.

Functions.Name: ClearVertexColorOverride
Functions.Description: Clear any applied vertex color override

Functions.Name: SetSkinWeightOverride
Functions.Description: Allow override of skin weights on a per-component basis.

Functions.Name: ClearSkinWeightOverride
Functions.Description: Clear any applied skin weight override

Functions.Name: SetSkinWeightProfile
Functions.Description: Setup an override Skin Weight Profile for this component

Functions.Name: ClearSkinWeightProfile
Functions.Description: Clear the Skin Weight Profile from this component, in case it is set

Functions.Name: UpdateSkinWeightForRemapping
Functions.Description: Update Skin weight for remapping skeleton

Functions.Name: UnloadSkinWeightProfile
Functions.Description: Unload a Skin Weight Profile's skin weight buffer (if created)

Functions.Name: GetCurrentSkinWeightProfileName
Functions.Description: Return the name of the Skin Weight Profile that is currently set otherwise returns 'None'

Functions.Name: IsUsingSkinWeightProfile
Functions.Description: Check whether or not a Skin Weight Profile is currently set

Functions.Name: InvalidateCachedBounds
Functions.Description: Invalidate Cached Bounds, when Mesh Component has been updated.

Functions.Name: RefreshUpdateRateParams
Functions.Description: Recreates update rate params and internal tracker data

Functions.Name: SetMasterPoseComponent
Functions.Description: Set MasterPoseComponent for this component

Functions.Name: GetBoneTransform
Functions.Description: Get Bone Transform from index

Return.Description: the transform of the bone at the specified index

Functions.Name: GetBoneLocation
Functions.Description: Get Bone Location

Functions.Name: BoneIsChildOf
Functions.Description: Tests if BoneName is child of (or equal to) ParentBoneName.

Return.Description: true if child (strictly, not same). false otherwise

Functions.Name: TransformToBoneSpace
Functions.Description:
Transform a locationrotation from world space to bone relative space.
	 	This is handy if you know the location in world space for a bone attachment, as AttachComponent takes locationrotation in bone-relative space.

Functions.Name: TransformFromBoneSpace
Functions.Description: Transform a locationrotation in bone relative space to world space.

Functions.Name: FindClosestBone_K2
Functions.Description: finds the closest bone to the given location

Params.Name: BoneLocation
Params.Description: (optional, out) if specified, set to the world space location of the bone that was found, or (0,0,0) if no bone was found

Params.Name: IgnoreScale
Params.Description: (optional) if specified, only bones with scaling larger than the specified factor are considered

Params.Name: bRequirePhysicsAsset
Params.Description: (optional) if true, only bones with physics will be considered

Return.Description: the name of the bone that was found, or 'None' if no bone was found

Functions.Name: HideBoneByName
Functions.Description:
Hides the specified bone with name.  Currently this just enforces a scale of 0 for the hidden bones.
	 	Compoared to HideBone By Index - This keeps track of list of bones and update when LOD changes

Params.Name: PhysBodyOption
Params.Description: Option for physics bodies that attach to the bones to be hidden

Functions.Name: UnHideBoneByName
Functions.Description:
UnHide the specified bone with name.  Currently this just enforces a scale of 0 for the hidden bones.
	 	Compoared to HideBone By Index - This keeps track of list of bones and update when LOD changes

Functions.Name: IsBoneHiddenByName
Functions.Description: Determines if the specified bone is hidden.

Functions.Name: EnableMeshClipPlane
Functions.Description: Engine modify End -----------

Functions.Name: EnableMeshClip4Planes
Functions.Description:
Num of ClipPlanes is 4
	  0: Top Plane
	  1: Down Plane
	  2: Left Plane
	  3: Right Plane

Functions.Name: SetRenderStatic
Functions.Description: Set whether this skinned mesh should be rendered as static mesh in a reference pose
